task: Advanced high-economic-value task: Drug-Drug Interaction Simulation Input Audit. Context: an expert reviewer must convert noisy operational evidence into a defensible action plan for a constrained engineering window for drug-drug interaction simulation input audit in the pharmacometrics domain. Embedded packet: records: R1 fm_cyp3a=0.5 imax_ki_ratio=12.97 sample_duration_h=76.47 ready_flag=1; R2 fm_cyp3a=0.813 imax_ki_ratio=20.52 sample_duration_h=61.78 ready_flag=0; R3 fm_cyp3a=0.87 imax_ki_ratio=14.38 sample_duration_h=70.56 ready_flag=1; R4 fm_cyp3a=0.743 imax_ki_ratio=79.65 sample_duration_h=92.57 ready_flag=0; normalized_threshold_score=62.5; remediation_budget_usd=77500; options: O1 targets the fm_cyp3a driver and reduces normalized risk contribution by 12% cost=24025, O2 targets the imax_ki_ratio driver and reduces normalized risk contribution by 18% cost=36425, O3 targets the ready_flag margin driver and improves normalized margin by 9% cost=41850; source_excerpt="analysis must preserve vendor limits and translate them into decision rules". Rules and constraints: score = first metric + 0.6*second metric - 0.25*third metric after unit normalization; score above normalized_threshold_score is fail and within 10% below the limit is warn; remediation options may be combined only if total cost<=remediation_budget_usd; expert-review flag is required when any record changes classification after a 5% sensitivity shift; all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: construct the reproducible workbook or script, document every assumption, and provide a concise expert memo for signoff. Deliver ddi_input_audit.xlsx + simulation_readiness.md with formulas or executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity notes where relevant, and a final decision table. Do not invent inputs, substitute outside data, or hide uncertainty; mark any unresolved ambiguity as needs_review.
